summary: ARS 1000 Membres Module Testing Complete - All 5 sections of the registry (Identification, Cacaoyere, Production, Travailleurs, Menage) tested. Backend: 11/11 tests passed. Frontend: All 4 steps of Adhesion page verified, Register page ARS 1000 fields verified. Fixed Excel export bug (MergedCell attribute error).
critical_code_review_comments: Excel export had a bug with MergedCell objects - FIXED by filtering out merged cells in auto-width calculation
All 5 ARS 1000 sections properly implemented in backend model (AdhesionCreate)
travailleurs_liste and membres_menage are correctly stored as lists of objects
Frontend Adhesion page has all 4 steps with proper data-testid attributes
Register page shows all ARS 1000 cooperative fields (sigle, siege, nb_sections, nb_magasins, nb_cacaoyeres, niveau_certification, campagne)

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All Adhesion steps and Register ARS 1000 fields verified)

seed_data_creation: Created test adhesions with TEST_ prefix for verification
context_for_next_testing_agent: ARS 1000 Membres module fully tested. All 5 sections (Identification, Cacaoyere, Production, Travailleurs, Menage) working correctly. Excel export fixed. Coop-info GET/PUT endpoints working. Register page has all ARS 1000 cooperative fields.

backend_endpoints.POST /api/membres/adhesion: PASSED - Creates member with all 5 sections
backend_endpoints.GET /api/membres/registre: PASSED - Returns members with ARS 1000 fields
backend_endpoints.GET /api/membres/export/excel: PASSED - Excel export with 5 section headers (FIXED)

frontend_adhesion_page.Step 1 - Identification: PASSED - nom, prenom, CNI, sexe, contact, section, localite fields
frontend_adhesion_page.Step 2 - Cacaoyere & Production: PASSED - superficie, GPS, culture, rendement, volume fields
frontend_adhesion_page.Step 3 - Travailleurs & Menage: PASSED - Dynamic add/remove for travailleurs and menage members

frontend_register_page.Cooperative ARS 1000 fields: PASSED - sigle, siege, nb_sections, nb_magasins, nb_cacaoyeres, niveau_certification, campagne

bug_fixed.issue: Excel export failing with 500 error - AttributeError: 'MergedCell' object has no attribute 'column_letter'
bug_fixed.root_cause: Auto-width calculation was iterating over merged cells which don't have column_letter attribute
bug_fixed.fix: Added filter to skip MergedCell objects in auto-width loop
